title: Positive flow: Complete BMI calculator setup with valid inputs
test_data: Standard (lbs, ft, in) | Current Weight (in LBS): 150 | Target Weight (in LBS): 160 | Height: 5 ft 6 in
test_steps: Select 'Standard (lbs, ft, in)' from the weight unit dropdown. | Enter '150' in the 'Current Weight (in LBS)' input field. | Enter '160' in the 'Target Weight (in LBS)' input field. | Select 'Height' from the height unit dropdown. | Enter '5 ft 6 in' in the height input field. | Click the 'Next' button at the bottom.
expected_result: The BMI calculation should be displayed. | The BMI value should be calculated and shown.
